summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Kerala Kanyakumari tour page implementation. All major features working correctly with 95% success rate.

ui_bugs.issue: Hero 'Enquire Now' button scroll to CTA section not working properly

passed_tests: Kerala page loads at /tours/kerala with hero showing 'Kerala Kanyakumari' title and tags
About This Journey section with backwater image and description
Quick Info strip with Duration (9N/10D or 7N/8D), Starting Point (Trivandrum), Trip Type (Nature & Cultural), Ideal For (Families & Nature Lovers)
7 destination cards (Kanyakumari, Trivandrum, Alleppey, Periyar, Munnar, Guruvayur, Cochin) with images and descriptions
Itinerary toggle between '10 Days (Full)' and '8 Days (Express)' versions working correctly
10-day itinerary accordion with all 10 days visible, Day 1 expanded by default
Switching to 8-day version shows 8 days in accordion
CTA banner 'Ready to Explore God's Own Country?' with Enquire Now button
Navbar Tours dropdown shows both 'Ashtavinayak Yatra' and 'Kerala Kanyakumari' under Domestic Tours
All images load successfully (hero + 7 destination images)
Responsive design works on desktop, tablet, and mobile
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix hero CTA button scroll functionality - the onClick handler should properly scroll to the #enquire section
